'''R2-RD''' was an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] paired with [[C-D20]], a Human-cyborg relations droid. They were assigned to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Dauntarist]] aboard a newly-manufactured [[HT-2200 medium freighter]].<ref name="ABGTAS" />

{{Droid-stub}}
